ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the database */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the database version */,
  "support_end_date" TEXT /* End date of support for the database version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database version the setting belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "changed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting has been changed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowed value for the setting */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowed value for the setting */,
  "readonly" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting is read-only */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration setting (e.g., UInt64) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting is required */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting is sensitive and should be protected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES database_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting after the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting before the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES configuration_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, support engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom profile */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the custom profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_profiles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_settings" (
  "profile_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile setting */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom profile the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting for the custom profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES configuration_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_settings_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES custom_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
